name: Mike Richmond
abstract: Mike Richmond (born February 26, 1948, in Philadelphia) is an American jazz bassist. Richmond started on guitar then picked up bass in his early teens.

concerts.label: Tribute to Charles Mingus: Mingus Music

about_quotes.speaker: John Abercrombie
about_quotes.evidence: finally Jack formed a band with myself and Alex Foster, a saxophone player, and Mike Richmond on bass. And we toured for a while as a band and made a couple of records for Manfred — Manfred, I say Manfred — ECM.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Abercrombie interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001
